profile.name: Mahima Gupta
profile.title: Senior UI/UX Designer | Product Designer | Visual Designer

summary: Senior UI/UX and product designer designing user-centered digital products for AI-driven platforms, robotics interfaces, enterprise SaaS, dashboards, voice UI, self-service kiosks, and hospitality/healthcare workflows.
positioning: Translates complex AI, robotics, kiosk, SaaS, and voice workflows into clear user experiences.
Combines research, interaction design, visual craft, prototyping, accessibility, and scalable Figma systems.
Useful for teams that need designer-led product clarity across emerging technology, operational tools, and customer-facing experiences.

highlights: Leads UI/UX design for AI-powered kiosks, robotics platforms, and enterprise dashboards.
Architected HeyAlpha, a multimodal conversational AI interface for voice/chat and touchless experiences.
Developed a scalable Figma design system that reduced handoff time by 25%.
Designed customer-facing experiences for Bikanervala, Green Park Hotels, Moxy Hotels by Marriott, Dabur, and India Gate Basmati.
Designed slot game interfaces, HUD elements, reels, in-game menus, and interactive feedback systems.
Created prototypes and user journey maps for gaming experiences.
Collaborated with Unity developers for pixel-perfect asset integration.
Created wireframes, low-fidelity prototypes, custom icon sets, and visual assets.

projects.impact: 92% usability rating and 40% check-in time reduction
projects.summary: Voice-assisted patient appointments and wayfinding kiosk system.
